prestazioni: Engine: FA24F (2.4L turbocharged boxer-4, direct/port injection) – Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger (82mm compressor, 106mm turbine, 44lb/min flow) paired with a custom 3.5-inch divorced wastegate manifold (Perrin Performance) and 4-inch titanium downpipe (Nameless Performance) with 300-cell catalytic converter for emissions compliance. Supporting mods include Cobb Tuning Big SF intake, IAG Competition Series intercooler (12-row, 100% aluminum), and Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with PCV reroute for oil control.

Drivetrain: GR6 8-speed automatic transmission – Full transmission reinforcement with a PTT (Performance Transmission Technologies) Stage 3 clutch pack upgrade, billet torque converter (2,800 RPM stall), and custom TCU tune via OpenECU (Subaru-specific ROM) to enable flat-foot shifting and launch control. Rear differential reinforcement with Cusco 2-way LSD (250Nm torque capacity) and upgraded driveshafts (Driveshaft Shop 3.5-inch carbon fiber units) for durability under 450whp.

Suspension/Chassis: Full Wilderness-specific lift kit (3-inch) retained with King Shocks 2.5-inch Remote Reservoir Coilovers (adjustable compression/rebound, 14-position valving) and Eibach Pro-Truck springs (800lb/in front, 600lb/in rear). Chassis bracing includes Cusco front strut tower bar (2-point, 4mm thick), Perrin Performance rear subframe brace, and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm, hollow core) to mitigate body roll during high-speed off-road transitions. Wheels: Method MR701 VT (17x9 +30 offset) with BFGoodrich KM3 285/70R17 tires (35-inch diameter) for 50/50 on-road/off-road grip.
estetica: Exterior: Full Wilderness XT-specific aero overhaul with Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser) retaining the factory matte gray paint but with a custom 3M 2080 Satin Black wrap on the hood, roof, and rear hatch. Lighting: Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights (5,000K) and Baja Designs Squadron Pro amber fog inserts for off-road visibility, paired with a custom aluminum roof rack (Prinsu Design) with integrated RotopaX 2.5-gallon fuel/water mounts and a Front Runner Slimline II awning.

Interior: Full Recaro SR-7 XL front seats (heated/ventilated, Subaru-specific bolt pattern) with Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses (ASM-compliant) and a custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK, 4-point bolt-in, T45 steel) integrated with a Sparco 6-point harness bar. Dash overlay with AIM MXS Strada 7-inch digital dash (CAN bus integration for FA24F telemetry) and a custom center console delete (replaced with a 3D-printed carbon fiber storage tray for a GoPro Hero 12 and Garmin Overlander GPS).

Functional Aesthetics: Custom aluminum skid plates (Rally Armor) with integrated recovery points (Factor 55 Flatlinks) and a hidden front-mounted Warn Zeon 12-S winch (12,000lb capacity) behind a removable aluminum mesh grille (custom fabrication). Rear bumper delete with a custom steel rear bumper (built by 4x4 Labs) featuring a swing-out tire carrier (Method 701 spare wheel mount) and dual RotopaX 1.75-gallon fuel cells for extended range.
